# preprompt

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Renders the launch special-instructions (preprompt) block as a collapsible section in the JSONL viewer.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `JsonlViewer.EventRenderer` "preprompt" → `PrepromptRow`
